channel.title: Stellhorn RV Golf Cart Feed
channel.description: Golf cart inventory for Google Shopping

item.title: New 2026 ICON Electric Vehicles EPIC E40FX
item.description: Get ready to stand out with the striking 2026 ICON Electric Vehicles EPIC E40FX New UTV in White Pearl. This electric beast isn't just stylish; it's equipped with an 8.4 horsepower engine that packs a punch. Whether you're riding solo or with a crew, this UTV offers ample space with two rows of seats, providing room for up to four passengers. The sleek steel frame not only adds durability but also gives you a sense of security as you navigate through tough terrain. With a top speed of 25 mph, the EPIC E40FX allows you to cruise effortlessly down trails and paths, all while enjoying a smooth ride thanks to the independent front suspension and leaf spring rear suspension. The 14-inch tires offer reliable traction, ensuring stability as you conquer any landscape in style. Powered by a 6.3kW AC motor and a lithium-ion battery, this UTV is not only environmentally friendly but also cost-effective, making it the perfect choice for the eco-conscious adventurer. Plus, with a continuous power output of 6.3 kW, you can trust that this vehicle delivers consistent performance when you need it most. Measuring at 9.9 feet long, 56 inches wide, and 79.5 inches tall, the EPIC E40FX is perfectly sized to tackle tight trails and wide-open spaces alike. With a ground clearance of 5.9 inches, you can easily navigate over obstacles without worrying about getting stuck. The White Pearl finish is sure to turn heads wherever you go, adding a pop of luxury to your outdoor adventures. Whether you're cruising around the neighborhood or exploring off-the-beaten-path trails, this UTV is designed to handle it all with ease. So, if you're looking for a stylish, powerful, and environmentally friendly off-road vehicle that can take you on epic adventures, look no further than the 2026 ICON Electric Vehicles EPIC E40FX in White Pearl. Get ready to experience the thrill of the ride like never before!

item.title: New 2026 ICON Electric Vehicles EPIC E40FX
item.description: Get ready to stand out with the striking 2026 ICON Electric Vehicles EPIC E40FX New UTV in Black. This electric beast isn't just stylish; it's equipped with an 8.4 horsepower engine that packs a punch. Whether you're riding solo or with a crew, this UTV offers ample space with two rows of seats, providing room for up to four passengers. The sleek steel frame not only adds durability but also gives you a sense of security as you navigate through tough terrain. With a top speed of 25 mph, the EPIC E40FX allows you to cruise effortlessly down trails and paths, all while enjoying a smooth ride thanks to the independent front suspension and leaf spring rear suspension. The 14-inch tires offer reliable traction, ensuring stability as you conquer any landscape in style. Powered by a 6.3kW AC motor and a lithium-ion battery, this UTV is not only environmentally friendly but also cost-effective, making it the perfect choice for the eco-conscious adventurer. Plus, with a continuous power output of 6.3 kW, you can trust that this vehicle delivers consistent performance when you need it most. Measuring at 9.9 feet long, 56 inches wide, and 79.5 inches tall, the EPIC E40FX is perfectly sized to tackle tight trails and wide-open spaces alike. With a ground clearance of 5.9 inches, you can easily navigate over obstacles without worrying about getting stuck. Whether you're cruising around the neighborhood or exploring off-the-beaten-path trails, this UTV is designed to handle it all with ease. So, if you're looking for a stylish, powerful, and environmentally friendly off-road vehicle that can take you on epic adventures, look no further than the 2026 ICON Electric Vehicles EPIC E40FX in Black. Get ready to experience the thrill of the ride like never before!

item.title: New 2026 ICON Electric Vehicles EPIC E40FX
item.description: Get ready to stand out with the striking 2026 ICON Electric Vehicles EPIC E40FX New UTV in Charcoal Grey. This electric beast isn't just stylish; it's equipped with an 8.4 horsepower engine that packs a punch. Whether you're riding solo or with a crew, this UTV offers ample space with two rows of seats, providing room for up to four passengers. The sleek steel frame not only adds durability but also gives you a sense of security as you navigate through tough terrain. With a top speed of 25 mph, the EPIC E40FX allows you to cruise effortlessly down trails and paths, all while enjoying a smooth ride thanks to the independent front suspension and leaf spring rear suspension. The 14-inch tires offer reliable traction, ensuring stability as you conquer any landscape in style. Powered by a 6.3kW AC motor and a lithium-ion battery, this UTV is not only environmentally friendly but also cost-effective, making it the perfect choice for the eco-conscious adventurer. Plus, with a continuous power output of 6.3 kW, you can trust that this vehicle delivers consistent performance when you need it most. Measuring at 9.9 feet long, 56 inches wide, and 79.5 inches tall, the EPIC E40FX is perfectly sized to tackle tight trails and wide-open spaces alike. With a ground clearance of 5.9 inches, you can easily navigate over obstacles without worrying about getting stuck. Whether you're cruising around the neighborhood or exploring off-the-beaten-path trails, this UTV is designed to handle it all with ease. So, if you're looking for a stylish, powerful, and environmentally friendly off-road vehicle that can take you on epic adventures, look no further than the 2026 ICON Electric Vehicles EPIC E40FX in Charcoal Grey. Get ready to experience the thrill of the ride like never before!

item.title: New 2026 ICON Electric Vehicles EPIC E60FX
item.description: Get ready to hit the trails in style with the 2026 ICON Electric Vehicles EPIC E60FX New UTV! This Personal UTV is a powerhouse, boasting an 8.4 horsepower 6.3kW AC Motor that is sure to deliver an exhilarating ride. Choose from a range of stunning colors, including the sleek Metallic Black for a bold look, the sophisticated Metallic Charcoal for a touch of elegance, the vibrant Metallic Cherry for a pop of color, the luxurious Metallic Cashmere for a classic feel, or the pristine Metallic Pearl White for a clean and modern appearance. At 12.5 feet long, 55.1 inches wide, and 80.3 inches tall, this UTV has a commanding presence on any terrain. With a ground clearance of 5.9 inches and 14-inch tires both in the front and rear, you can take on rough trails with ease. The steel frame provides durability and stability, while the independent front suspension ensures a smooth and comfortable ride for all six passengers across three rows of seating. Equipped with a 6.3kW AC Motor and a direct drive transmission, this UTV offers seamless power delivery and impressive acceleration. The top speed of 25.0 mph and continuous power output of 6.3 kW guarantee an exciting driving experience every time you step behind the wheel. With hydraulic disc brakes on both the front and rear wheels, you can count on reliable stopping power whenever you need it. The 4X2 driveline configuration ensures optimal traction on various terrains, letting you conquer mud, rocks, and everything in between. The Electric UTV is powered by a single lithium-ion battery, delivering efficient and reliable performance. Say goodbye to gas stations and enjoy the quiet, emission-free operation of this cutting-edge electric vehicle. Whether you're exploring the great outdoors or cruising around your property, the 2026 ICON Electric Vehicles EPIC E60FX New UTV is ready for any adventure. Choose your favorite color, buckle up, and get ready to experience the thrill of electric power in style.

Whether you're exploring the great outdoors or cruising around your property, the 2026 ICON Electric Vehicles EPIC E60FX New UTV is ready for any adventure.
